title: myosotis perennis var. sylvatica
intro: Myosotis perennis var. sylvatica, also known as woodland forget-me-not, is a variety of the forget-me-not plant that is native to the woodlands and shaded areas in Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of woodland forget-me-not include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and soothing the digestive system. The plant is often prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to treat various health conditions, or as a dietary supplement to promote overall well-being.
